teach.adaptation: General-use OpenCode teaching skill. Keep OpenCode-compatible frontmatter; do not add Pi-only fields.

grill-me.adaptation: Preserve manual-only Pi frontmatter; inline grilling primitive and no-tracker guardrails.

grill-with-docs.adaptation: Preserve manual-only Pi frontmatter and no tracker assumptions.

handoff.adaptation: Preserve manual-only Pi frontmatter and local/no-remote tracker guardrails.

triage.adaptation: Preserve manual-only Pi frontmatter; adapt tracker workflow to local markdown issues under .scratch/.

to-spec.adaptation: Publish to local markdown tracker at .scratch/<feature-slug>/PRD.md for AFK compatibility; never create remote tracker items.

to-tickets.adaptation: Publish local markdown tickets at .scratch/<feature-slug>/issues/*.md; never create remote tracker items.

wayfinder.adaptation: Preserve manual-only Pi frontmatter; use local markdown map and tickets under .scratch/ instead of remote tracker issues.

implement.adaptation: Preserve manual-only Pi frontmatter; do not commit unless the user explicitly asks.

prototype.adaptation: Preserve manual-only Pi frontmatter, throwaway-code guardrails, and local/no-remote tracker guardrails.

research.adaptation: Preserve manual-only Pi frontmatter and adapt background-agent wording to available Pi tools.

codebase-design.adaptation: Preserve manual-only Pi frontmatter and adapt subagent wording to Pi.

code-review.adaptation: Preserve manual-only Pi frontmatter; use local specs/tickets and adapt subagent wording to Pi.

improve-codebase-architecture.adaptation: Preserve manual-only Pi frontmatter and adapt unavailable tool/subagent wording to Pi.
